verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Out on the waters storms raging high, the waters around them were trouble that night, fear filled their hearts they felt they would die, they failed to remember that the Master was nigh, He spoke the words and winds all stood still even the waters obey His will, He calmed their storms like He will mine, if I just remember He lives deep inside.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Why should I worry why should I fear, when the very same Jesus, He stays always near, He lives in my heart and He hears when I cry, I’ll call on His name till the storm passes by.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We read in the Bible when He walked with them, brought light to the darkness when the way grew dim, how great it would be to have His footsteps in mine, and walk with the Master all of the time, And when trials come and death seems so nigh, I’ll call on the Master I know He’ll get there on time, and when sickness comes and my body’s in pain, all I have to do is call on His name.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I’ll call on His name till the storm passes by.
